characters.name: Curious Nomad
characters.description: A free-spirited explorer who finds joy in discovery and new experiences. You value freedom and delight in life's surprises.

characters.name: Mindful Seeker
characters.description: A contemplative soul who finds deep meaning in life's purpose and spiritual connections. You prioritize reflection and growth.

characters.name: Joyful Creator
characters.description: A vibrant artist who finds delight in creativity and beauty. You bring color and playfulness to everything you do.

characters.name: Balanced Dreamer
characters.description: A harmonious soul who balances meaning and delight. You find purpose in joy and joy in purpose.

characters.name: Free Spirit
characters.description: An independent soul who values freedom above all. You chart your own course and live by your own rules.

characters.name: Purposeful Wanderer
characters.description: A focused explorer who combines freedom with meaning. You seek purpose while maintaining independence.

characters.name: Playful Rebel
characters.description: A carefree spirit who finds joy in freedom. You delight in breaking boundaries and living spontaneously.

characters.name: Harmonious Explorer
characters.description: A balanced adventurer who finds meaning, delight, and freedom in equal measure. You live life fully and authentically.

characters.name: Dedicated Achiever
characters.description: A focused professional who finds deep engagement in meaningful work. You're committed to excellence and growth.

characters.name: Spiritual Professional
characters.description: A mindful worker who combines engagement with spiritual meaning. You find purpose in your professional growth.

characters.name: Creative Professional
characters.description: An engaged artist who finds joy in their work. You bring creativity and delight to your professional life.

characters.name: Fulfilled Professional
characters.description: A satisfied worker who finds meaning, delight, and engagement in their career. You've found your calling.

characters.name: Independent Professional
characters.description: A self-directed worker who values freedom and engagement. You chart your own professional path.

characters.name: Purposeful Professional
characters.description: A focused worker who combines freedom, meaning, and engagement. You've found your professional purpose.

characters.name: Joyful Professional
characters.description: A happy worker who finds freedom, delight, and engagement in their career. You love what you do.

characters.name: Complete Professional
characters.description: A fulfilled worker who has achieved the perfect balance of freedom, meaning, delight, and engagement. You're living your dream career.

characters.name: Vital Achiever
characters.description: A healthy professional who combines engagement with vitality. You're energized and focused in your work.

characters.name: Spiritual Vitalist
characters.description: A mindful person who combines vitality with spiritual meaning. You're healthy in body and soul.

characters.name: Joyful Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who finds delight in vitality. You're energized and happy in your daily life.

characters.name: Fulfilled Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who finds meaning and delight in vitality. You're energized, happy, and purposeful.

characters.name: Free Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who values freedom and vitality. You're energized and independent in your lifestyle.

characters.name: Purposeful Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines freedom, meaning, and vitality. You're energized, independent, and purposeful.

characters.name: Joyful Free Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who finds freedom, delight, and vitality. You're energized, independent, and happy.

characters.name: Complete Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who has achieved the perfect balance of freedom, meaning, delight, and vitality. You're living your best life.

characters.name: Engaged Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines vitality with deep engagement. You're energized and focused in your activities.

characters.name: Spiritual Engaged Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines vitality, engagement, and spiritual meaning. You're energized, focused, and purposeful.

characters.name: Joyful Engaged Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines vitality, engagement, and delight. You're energized, focused, and happy.

characters.name: Fulfilled Engaged Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines vitality, engagement, meaning, and delight. You're energized, focused, happy, and purposeful.

characters.name: Free Engaged Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines vitality, engagement, and freedom. You're energized, focused, and independent.

characters.name: Purposeful Free Engaged Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines vitality, engagement, freedom, and meaning. You're energized, focused, independent, and purposeful.

characters.name: Joyful Free Engaged Vitalist
characters.description: A healthy person who combines vitality, engagement, freedom, and delight. You're energized, focused, independent, and happy.

characters.name: Complete Human
characters.description: You've achieved the perfect balance of all five happiness dimensions: Meaning, Delight, Freedom, Engagement, and Vitality. You're living your fullest, most authentic life.
